quiz.title: Unit 14 Quiz 2: Parametric Equations
quiz.subtitle: Derivatives, Tangents, Speed, and Arc Length
quiz.subject: Mathematics

questions.question: A curve is defined by $x = t^3 - 3t$, $y = t^2 - 2$. Find $\frac{dy}{dx}$ in terms of $t$.
Find the slope of the tangent line to the curve $x = e^t$, $y = \ln(t+1)$ at $t = 0$.
For the parametric curve $x = 2t^3$, $y = 3t^2 - 12t$, find the point(s) where the tangent line is horizontal.
questions.explanation: Horizontal tangent when $\frac{dy}{dt}=0$ and $\frac{dx}{dt}\neq0$. $\frac{dy}{dt}=6t-12=0 \Rightarrow t=2$. Then $x=2(8)=16$, $y=12-24=-12$.

questions.question: A particle moves with position $x = \sin t$, $y = \cos(2t)$. Find the velocity vector at $t = \frac{\pi}{3}$.
Find $\frac{d^2y}{dx^2}$ for the curve $x = \sqrt{t}$, $y = t^2$ at $t = 4$.
The position of a particle is given by $x = 2t^2$, $y = t^3 - 3t$. Find the speed of the particle at $t = 2$.
Find the length of the arc of the curve $x = t - \sin t$, $y = 1 - \cos t$ from $t = 0$ to $t = \pi$.
questions.explanation: $\frac{dx}{dt}=1-\cos t$, $\frac{dy}{dt}=\sin t$. Arc length $= \int_0^\pi \sqrt{(1-\cos t)^2+\sin^2 t}\,dt = \int_0^\pi \sqrt{2-2\cos t}\,dt = \int_0^\pi 2\sin(t/2)\,dt = 4$.

questions.question: Find an equation of the tangent line to the curve $x = \cos\theta$, $y = \sin(2\theta)$ at $\theta = \frac{\pi}{4}$.
questions.explanation: At $\theta=\pi/4$: $x=\sqrt{2}/2$, $y=1$. $\frac{dy}{dx} = \frac{2\cos(2\theta)}{-\sin\theta} = 0$ at $\theta=\pi/4$, so tangent is horizontal: $y=1$.

questions.question: For the curve $x = t^3 - 3t$, $y = t^3 - 3t^2$, find the points where the tangent line is vertical.
questions.explanation:
Vertical tangent when $ rac{dx}{dt}=0$ and $ rac{dy}{dt}
eq0$. $ rac{dx}{dt}=3t^2-3=0 \Rightarrow t=\pm1$. At $t=1$: $x=-2$, $y=-2$; $ rac{dy}{dt}=3t^2-6t=-3
eq0$. At $t=-1$: $x=2$, $y=-4$; $ rac{dy}{dt}=3+6=9
eq0$.

questions.question: A curve is given by $x = 2\cos\theta - \cos(2\theta)$, $y = 2\sin\theta - \sin(2\theta)$. Find $\frac{dy}{dx}$ at $\theta = \frac{\pi}{2}$.

scoreMessages.90: Excellent! You have mastered parametric equations and their applications.
scoreMessages.70: Good job! Review arc length and higher derivatives.
scoreMessages.50: Keep practicing! Focus on derivatives of parametric curves and tangent lines.
scoreMessages.0: Review parametric derivatives and the concepts of horizontal/vertical tangents.
